rationale: The subject home (21106 Kenswick Meadows Ct, Humble TX) is clearly under active construction. The large light-gray plan-view area is exposed OSB roof sheathing with no shingles installed. A partially completed dark-shingled hip-roof section is visible at the upper portion of the orange bounding box. Bounding box measured at approximately 268 × 270 pixels = 56.8 ft × 57.2 ft = ~3,250 sq ft bounding area. Applied a 0.77 fill factor for the irregular L-shaped/complex footprint to yield ~2,500 sq ft. Edge types extrapolated from the visible completed hip-roof section at the top of the structure and the general structural form of the main body. Confidence is low (0.32) due to the under-construction state: shingle edges, hip lines, valleys, and eave terminations are not yet clearly defined from the satellite view, and construction debris partially obscures the perimeter.
